name: RPlog_Something_Amiss
title: Something Amiss
summary: In the crowded New Republic starport, the quarren captain Jack and his menacing squib companion Grizz are recruiting a crew when a small, ragged young human who calls himself Kitty approaches looking for cheap lodging. The pair good-naturedly mock the newcomer's slight build and empty pockets, but warm to his bravado and claim of being a skilled swoop and ship mechanic. Jack offers Kitty a berth aboard a ship he has yet to actually buy, promising food, ale, and a share of any fortune. Kitty shakes on the deal, then wanders off to find a bed for the night, leaving the captain and his squib amused by their feisty new hire.
